AJAMAMODIFIERS-TOO_MANY_CARDS_POWER_OF_F:
When [gold]Too Many Cards[/gold] and [gold]Power of Friendship[/gold] are both enabled, there is special behaviour to link Power cards together.

If Player A plays the 'Accuracy' from Player B's deck, ALL players play that 'Accuracy' and remove that card from combat.

Disable this to remove the special behaviour and let Players B, C, and D all individually play the Accuracy from Player B's deck for ALL players.
